name: Spring Thaw
description: Frozen landscape cracking and melting to life

prompts.label: frozen landscape cracking and melting awake with spring thaw
prompts.text: frozen landscape cracking and melting awake with spring thaw, forest clearing at dawn, wooden mallet on hollow log, morning dew stillness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, with natural decay

prompts.label: ice breaking on river with flowing water rushing beneath
prompts.text: ice breaking on river with flowing water rushing beneath, moss-covered stone garden, rain droplet on broad leaf, sun-warmed earth, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: winter silence yielding to trickling streams and dripping icicles
prompts.text: winter silence yielding to trickling streams and dripping icicles, bamboo grove in gentle wind, smooth river stones clinking, birdsong tranquility, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, sustained resonance

prompts.label: glacier creaking as warmth spreads through frozen earth
prompts.text: glacier creaking as warmth spreads through frozen earth, creek bed after summer rain, fingertip-plucked kalimba tine, deep forest solitude, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, with natural decay

prompts.label: first flowers pushing through snow with triumphant green energy
prompts.text: first flowers pushing through snow with triumphant green energy, meadow with distant thunder, ceramic wind chime in breeze, waterfall mist on skin, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, smooth fade out
